ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tools" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bioinformatics tool */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the bioinformatics tool */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tool's functionality */,
  "tool_version" TEXT /* Version of the bioinformatics tool */,
  "tool_url" TEXT /* URL to the official documentation or repository of the tool */,
  "tool_license" TEXT /* License under which the tool is released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sample */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "collection_location" TEXT /* Location where the sample was collected */,
  "collector_name" TEXT /* Name of the person who collected the sample */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of the sample (e.g., soil, water, air) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the sample belongs */,
  "sample_status" TEXT /* Status of the sample (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bioinformatics tool used */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample analyzed */,
  "weighted_unifrac_error" REAL /* Weighted UniFrac error metric */,
  "unweighted_unifrac_error" REAL /* Unweighted UniFrac error metric */,
  "l1_norm_error" REAL /* L1 norm error metric */,
  "completeness" REAL /* Completeness (recall) metric */,
  "purity" REAL /* Purity (precision) metric */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score metric */,
  "true_positives" INTEGER /* Number of true positives */,
  "false_positives" INTEGER /* Number of false positives */,
  "false_negatives" INTEGER /* Number of false negatives */,
  "taxon_counts" INTEGER /* Number of taxon counts */,
  "jaccard_index" REAL /* Jaccard index metric */,
  "shannon_diversity" REAL /* Shannon diversity metric */,
  "shannon_equitability" REAL /* Shannon equitability metric */,
  "bray_curtis_distance" REAL /* Bray-Curtis distance metric */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the analysis in minutes */,
  "analysis_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the analysis */,
  "analysis_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the analysis */,
  "analysis_status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES tools ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, banned) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the user group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user group */,
  "group_status" TEXT /* Status of the group (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "group_leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the leader of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group membership */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "membership_status" TEXT /* Status of the membership (e.g., active, pending, rejected) */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user joined the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_memberships_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES user_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_memberships_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, HTML, CSV) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report share */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "shared_with_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with whom the report is shared */,
  "shared_with_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group with whom the report is shared */,
  "shared_at" TEXT /* Date the report was shared */,
  "share_status" TEXT /* Status of the share (e.g., active, expired) */,
  "share_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the share will expire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_shares_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_shares_shared_with_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("shared_with_group_id") REFERENCES user_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_shares_shared_with_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("shared_with_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., FASTA, FASTQ, BAM) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., text, binary) */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure file integrity */,
  "file_status" TEXT /* Status of the file (e.g., uploaded, processing, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata (e.g., environmental condition, sampling method) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "metadata_source" TEXT /* Source of the metadata (e.g., manual entry, automated extraction) */,
  "metadata_status" TEXT /* Status of the metadata (e.g., verified, unverified) */,
  "metadata_date" TEXT /* Date when the metadata was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxonomy" (
  "taxon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxonomic entry */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample */,
  "taxon_name" TEXT /* Name of the taxon */,
  "taxon_rank" TEXT /* Rank of the taxon (e.g., kingdom, phylum, genus, species) */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage abundance of the taxon in the sample */,
  "taxon_source" TEXT /* Source of the taxonomic information (e.g., NCBI, SILVA) */,
  "taxon_status" TEXT /* Status of the taxon entry (e.g., confirmed, tentative) */,
  "taxon_confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the taxon classification (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taxonomy_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)
